overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Death Stranding showing the protagonist Sam Porter Bridges traversing a desolate volcanic mountain landscape. The character navigates rocky terrain, open plateaus, and narrow valleys under overcast skies with light rain, carrying a large cargo container on his back.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow rocky mountain passage with large boulders

events.description: character jumps down from a rock ledge to lower ground
terrain opens up from enclosed rocky passage to wider plateau area

agents.ego_description: carefully navigating through tight rocky terrain, jumping down from ledges, and moving between large boulders

entered.detail: steep volcanic rock wall forming the left boundary of the narrow path
scattered large boulders and rocky terrain on the right side
hazy silhouette of mountain peaks visible in the far distance
prominent rock formation blocking part of the path

segments.scene_description: The segment begins in a narrow enclosed rocky passage with steep volcanic walls on both sides. The character navigates carefully between large boulders, jumping down from a ledge around the 3-second mark. The terrain gradually opens up toward the end of the segment, transitioning from tight enclosed space to a wider area with distant mountains visible through the haze.

scene_state.functional_zone: open volcanic plateau with scattered rock formations

events.description: light rain begins to fall, becoming visible as particles in the air
character transitions from walking to a faster jogging pace across the open terrain

agents.ego_description: jogging steadily across the open plateau as rain begins to fall, maintaining balance with the large cargo container

entered.detail: wide expanse of dark volcanic rock and ash covering the ground
visible rain droplets falling through the air starting mid-segment
isolated rock formation rising from the plateau floor
distant view of a valley entrance between mountain peaks

segments.scene_description: The character emerges into a wide open volcanic plateau under an overcast sky. Rain begins to fall around 18 seconds, creating a misty atmosphere. The character picks up speed to a jog, moving across the dark rocky ground toward a distant valley entrance visible on the horizon. The enclosed rocks from the previous segment fall behind as the landscape opens up.

scene_state.functional_zone: mountain valley passage with steep rock walls

events.description: entering a narrow valley between large steep rock formations
character makes a slight left turn to follow the curving valley path

agents.ego_description: moving through the valley passage between steep volcanic walls, adjusting direction to follow the winding path

entered.detail: opening between two large rock formations marking the valley entry point
steep cliff face forming the left boundary of the valley
tall rock wall rising on the right side of the path
distant view of the valley exit visible through the narrow passage

segments.scene_description: The character approaches and enters a narrow mountain valley around the 40-second mark. Steep rock walls rise on both sides, creating a corridor-like passage. The rain continues to fall as the character navigates the winding path, making a slight left turn to follow the valley's curve. The open plateau gives way to enclosed rocky walls that frame the path forward.

scene_state.functional_zone: winding narrow valley path with enclosing rock walls

events.description: character slows slightly while navigating rocky debris on the valley floor

agents.ego_description: continuing through the winding valley, carefully stepping over rock debris and scree on the ground

entered.detail: narrow trail curving through the valley with uneven rocky surface
tall steep cliff face close to the left side of the path
rock wall rising steeply on the right, creating a narrow passage
loose rock debris and stones scattered on the valley floor
narrow gap visible in the distance where the valley continues

segments.scene_description: The final segment continues through the narrow winding valley with steep enclosing walls on both sides. The path becomes rockier with visible scree and debris on the ground. The character slows slightly to navigate the uneven terrain. The valley walls create a corridor effect as the character moves toward a distant pass visible ahead, with the rain continuing to fall in the desolate mountain landscape.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a claustrophobic volcanic passage that gradually expands into a vast, rain-swept plateau. It begins within a narrow rocky corridor with steep walls, where the character carefully navigates between large boulders and jumps down from a ledge. As the camera moves forward, the tight enclosure begins to give way, revealing distant mountains through a thick haze. The scene then opens fully into a wide volcanic plateau under an overcast sky, where the lighting softens as rain begins to fall and create a misty atmosphere. Finally, the character picks up speed to a jog across the dark rocky ground, moving away from the narrow cliffs toward a distant valley entrance on the horizon.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement as an open plateau narrows into a claustrophobic, winding mountain corridor. It begins with the character approaching and entering a steep valley, where towering rock walls rise on both sides to frame a winding path. As the character makes a slight left turn to follow the curve of the valley, the environment shifts from an open landscape to an enclosed passage under a steady rain. The scene then progresses further into the gorge, where the ground becomes increasingly rugged with visible scree and debris that force a slower pace. Finally, the camera tracks the character through this rocky corridor as they move toward a distant pass visible ahead in the desolate landscape.
